items.title: Automated Quality Assurance
items.description: Used Cursor AI and GitHub Copilot for preliminary PR reviews, cutting manual review time by 30% while holding strict PSR-12 standards.

items.title: Technical Debt Mitigation
items.description: Used LLMs to identify and refactor code smells and optimize time complexity in legacy PHP modules.

items.title: Documentation Automation
items.description: Used AI to generate Swagger API documentation directly from controller logic, speeding up the API lifecycle.

items.title: Prompt Engineering Leadership
items.description: Mentored the engineering team on prompt engineering techniques to improve code-generation accuracy and shorten debugging cycles.
